Test run or drag to
bookmarklets bar to install

javascript:function%20loadingNotice(e)%7Bvar%20t%3Ddocument.createElement(%22DIV%22)%3Bt.id%3D%22a11y-loader%22%2Ct.style.cssText%3D%22display%3A%20flex%3Bflex-direction%3A%20row%3Bflex-wrap%3A%20nowrap%3Bjustify-content%3A%20center%3Balign-content%3A%20center%3Balign-items%3A%20center%3Bposition%3A%20fixed%3Bheight%3A%20100%25%3Bwidth%3A%20100%25%3Bbackground%3A%20rgba(0%2C0%2C0%2C0.5)%3Bz-index%3A%209999%3Btop%3A%200%3B%20bottom%3A%200%3Bleft%3A%200%3Bright%3A%200%3B%22%2Ct.setAttribute(%22role%22%2C%22dialog%22)%3Bvar%20i%3Ddocument.createElement(%22DIV%22)%3Bi.style.cssText%3D%22background%3A%20%23fff%3Btext-align%3A%20center%3Bpadding%3A%202em%3Bfont-size%3A%202rem%3B%22%2Ci.innerHTML%3De%2Ct.appendChild(i)%2Cdocument.body.appendChild(t)%7Dfunction%20removeLoadingNotice()%7Bdocument.getElementById(%22a11y-loader%22)%26%26document.body.removeChild(document.getElementById(%22a11y-loader%22))%7Dfunction%20getTextPlusAlt(e)%7Bvar%20t%3D%22%22%3Bif(3%3D%3D%3De.nodeType)return%20e.textContent%3Bif(1%3D%3D%3De.nodeType%26%26%21isVisible(e))return%22%22%3Bif(1%3D%3D%3De.nodeType%26%26%22IMG%22%3D%3D%3De.nodeName)return%20e.hasAttribute(%22alt%22)%3Fe.alt%3A%22%22%3Bif(1%3D%3D%3De.nodeType)%7Bvar%20i%3De.childNodes%3Bif(0%3D%3Di.length)return%20e.innerText%3Bfor(var%20n%3D0%3Bn%3Ci.length%3Bn%2B%2B)t%2B%3DgetTextPlusAlt(i%5Bn%5D)%3Breturn%20t%7Dreturn%22ERROR%22%7Dfunction%20isVisible(e)%7Bfor(var%20t%3Dwindow.getComputedStyle(e)%2Ci%3D%211%3Be%3B)%7Bif(%22none%22%3D%3D%3Dt.display)return%211%3Bif(%21i)%7Bif(%22hidden%22%3D%3D%3Dt.visibility)return%211%3B%22visible%22%3D%3D%3Dt.visibility%26%26(i%3D%210)%7Dif(%22true%22%3D%3D%3De.getAttribute(%22aria-hidden%22))return%211%3Be%3De.parentElement%3Btry%7Bt%3Dwindow.getComputedStyle(e)%7Dcatch(e)%7Breturn%210%7D%7Dreturn%210%7Dfunction%20isVisuallyHidden(e)%7Bvar%20t%3De.getBoundingClientRect(e)%3Bif(%22absolute%22%3D%3D%3Dwindow.getComputedStyle(e).position)%7Bif(t.width%3C%3D1%26%26t.height%3C%3D1)return%210%3Bif(t.right%3C%3D0)return%210%7D%7Dfunction%20Requirement(e%2Ct%2Ci)%7Bthis.name%3De%2Cthis.src%3Dt%2Cthis.loaded%3Di%7Dfunction%20processRequirements()%7Bvar%20e%2Ct%2Ci%2Cn%3Ddocument.A11Y_REQUIREMENTS.slice()%3Bdocument.A11Y_REQUIREMENTS%3D%5B%5D%3Bvar%20r%3D%5B%5D%3Bfor(e%3D0%3Be%3Cn.length%3Be%2B%2B)n%5Be%5Din%20REQUIREMENTS%26%26((t%3DREQUIREMENTS%5Bn%5Be%5D%5D).loaded()%7C%7Cnull%21%3D(i%3DloadRequirement(t.name))%26%26r.push(i))%3Breturn%20r%7Dfunction%20loadRequirement(e)%7Breturn%20e%20in%20REQUIREMENTS%3FREQUIREMENTS%5Be%5D.loaded()%3Fnull%3Anew%20Promise(function(t%2Ci)%7Bvar%20n%3Ddocument.createElement(%22script%22)%3Bn.onload%3Dfunction()%7Bt(e)%7D%2Cn.onerror%3Dfunction()%7Bi(e)%7D%2Cn.async%3D%210%2Cn.src%3DREQUIREMENTS%5Be%5D.src%2Cdocument.body.appendChild(n)%7D)%3Anull%7Dfunction%20runA11YTool(e)%7BreallyRunA11YTool(runA11YTool%2Ce)%7Dfunction%20reallyRunA11YTool(e%2Ct)%7Bvar%20i%3DprocessRequirements()%3Bi.length%3E0%3FPromise.all(i).then(function()%7B0%3D%3Ddocument.A11Y_REQUIREMENTS.length%3Ft()%3Ae(t)%7D).catch(function(e)%7Balert(%22Resource%20failed%20to%20load%3A%5Cn%22%2Be)%2CremoveLoadingNotice()%7D)%3At()%7Dvar%20REQUIREMENTS%3D%5B%5D%3BREQUIREMENTS%5B%22axe.min.js%22%5D%3Dnew%20Requirement(%22axe.min.js%22%2C%22https%3A%2F%2Fmetageeky.github.io%2Faccessibility-bookmarklet%2Fexternals%2Faxe.min.js%22%2Cfunction()%7Breturn%22object%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20axe%26%26%22function%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20axe.run%7D)%2CREQUIREMENTS%5B%22tabbable.js%22%5D%3Dnew%20Requirement(%22tabbable.js%22%2C%22https%3A%2F%2Fmetageeky.github.io%2Faccessibility-bookmarklet%2Fexternals%2Ftabbable.js%22%2Cfunction()%7Breturn%22object%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20tabbable%26%26%22function%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20tabbable.isTabbable%7D)%2CREQUIREMENTS%5B%22w3c-alternative-text-computation.js%22%5D%3Dnew%20Requirement(%22w3c-alternative-text-computation.js%22%2C%22https%3A%2F%2Fmetageeky.github.io%2Faccessibility-bookmarklet%2Fexternals%2Fw3c-alternative-text-computation.js%22%2Cfunction()%7Breturn%22function%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20getAccName%7D)%2CREQUIREMENTS%5B%22general-report-tests.js%22%5D%3Dnew%20Requirement(%22general-report-tests.js%22%2C%22https%3A%2F%2Fmetageeky.github.io%2Faccessibility-bookmarklet%2Flibraries%2Fa11y-general-report-tests.js%22%2Cfunction()%7Breturn%21(%22undefined%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20_shibA11YGenRepTests)%7D)%2CREQUIREMENTS%5B%22report-ui.js%22%5D%3Dnew%20Requirement(%22report-ui.js%22%2C%22https%3A%2F%2Fmetageeky.github.io%2Faccessibility-bookmarklet%2Flibraries%2Fa11y-report-ui.js%22%2Cfunction()%7Breturn%21(%22undefined%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20_shibA11YRepUI)%7D)%2CREQUIREMENTS%5B%22image-reviewer-ui.js%22%5D%3Dnew%20Requirement(%22image-reviewer-ui.js%22%2C%22https%3A%2F%2Fmetageeky.github.io%2Faccessibility-bookmarklet%2Flibraries%2Fa11y-image-reviewer-ui.js%22%2Cfunction()%7Breturn%21(%22undefined%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20_shibA11YImgRevUI)%7D)%2CREQUIREMENTS%5B%22tabbable-reviewer-ui.js%22%5D%3Dnew%20Requirement(%22tabbable-reviewer-ui.js%22%2C%22https%3A%2F%2Fmetageeky.github.io%2Faccessibility-bookmarklet%2Flibraries%2Fa11y-tabbable-reviewer-ui.js%22%2Cfunction()%7Breturn%21(%22undefined%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20_shibA11YTabRevUI)%7D)%2CREQUIREMENTS%5B%22libguide-report-tests.js%22%5D%3Dnew%20Requirement(%22libguide-report-tests.js%22%2C%22https%3A%2F%2Fmetageeky.github.io%2Faccessibility-bookmarklet%2Flibraries%2Fa11y-libguide-report-tests.js%22%2Cfunction()%7Breturn%21(%22undefined%22%3D%3Dtypeof%20_shibA11YLibGuideRepTests)%7D)%3B
